player_character: blocky roblox character with colored outfit and legs walking around in the center of the frame with no text above its head
other_player: roblox player character with grey text above its head, not always in the center of the frame
brainrot: roblox charater that has multiple lines of text of different colors above its head
coin_currency: yello or green text starting with $ sign
shop_booth: shop stand booth or vendor stall with a sign or counter
payer_currency_display: currency or money counter display in the bottom left corner of the screen
interactive_prompt: press E interaction prompt or button popup near a brainrot
obstacle: wall fence barrier or obstacle blocking movement path
door_entrance: door entrance portal or teleport pad on the ground
stairs: small L shaped blocks leading up
